captures.caption: An enemy reaches the ship and it turns red as the game freezes — the first way to lose. Nothing responds afterwards: the wave hangs where it was, mid-descent.
captures.alt: The ship moves and a descending green enemy catches it; on contact the ship turns red and everything stops — the enemies freeze in place and the controls no longer respond.

captures.caption: The moment of death, heard: voice 3 — the SID's third and last channel — gates a low sawtooth note that rings out and fades over a long decay as the ship dies.
captures.alt: A single low sawtooth tone sounds at the instant the ship is hit and fades slowly away over about a second — the death sound, on the SID's third voice.
